competitors.name: Rarity Sniper
features: Supports 100,000+ verified EVM NFT collections
Real-time rarity updates for live mints
Chrome extension for 1-click rarity checks on OpenSea/Blur
Direct buy links for rare listed NFTs
weaknesses: Limited support for non-EVM blockchains (Solana, Cardano, Sui)
Heavy pop-up ad load on free tier
Advanced trait filtering locked behind paywall

competitors.name: Rarity Tools
features: Industry-standard rarity scoring methodology widely adopted by the NFT community
Verified collection badges to avoid scam listings
Trait normalization for accurate rarity calculation
Historical rarity trend tracking for collections
weaknesses: No support for new non-EVM chains
Custom collection uploads locked behind premium tier
No mobile app or Discord bot integration

competitors.name: Trait Sniper
features: Pre-reveal rarity calculation for ongoing mints
Real-time listing alerts for rare NFTs below floor price
Wallet portfolio rarity tracking
Bulk rarity lookup for multiple NFTs
weaknesses: Frequent false rarity scores for unrevealed collections
Intrusive video ads on free tier

competitors.name: Icy Tools
features: Cross-chain support for EVM and Solana NFTs
Combined rarity + market performance metrics
Whale wallet tracking alongside rarity data
Custom price and rarity alerting
weaknesses: Free tier limited to 10 queries per day
Steep learning curve for new casual users
Rarity scores less widely recognized than Rarity Tools standard
No custom collection upload for independent creators

competitors.name: Rarity Sniffer
features: Ultra-fast pre-reveal rarity calculation for new mints
Zero onboarding required for quick checks
Discord bot integration for community servers
Low latency for real-time mint monitoring
weaknesses: No support for older, non-mint collections
High volume of unverified scam collections listed
Barebones UI with no filtering options
No portfolio tracking or historical data

gaps.gap: Lack of full multi-chain support for under-served non-EVM ecosystems
gaps.implementation: Build chain-agnostic rarity calculation modules that pull on-chain metadata for 8+ underserved chains (Solana, Cardano, Sui, Aptos, Cosmos, Tezos, Flow, Arbitrum Stylus), add chain-specific verified collection badges, and unify the scoring methodology across all chains

gaps.gap: No free custom rarity calculation for independent small creators
gaps.implementation: Add a drag-and-drop metadata upload tool for creators, auto-calculate standard rarity scores for free, allow creators to embed a white-label rarity checker on their website/Discord for free, and monetize only optional premium features like promoted collection listings and advanced trait customization

gaps.gap: Intrusive ads and paywalls for core rarity checking functionality across all existing tools
gaps.implementation: Offer 100% ad-free core rarity checks (full trait breakdown, rank, score) for free up to 150 queries per user per day, and lock only advanced features (mint alerts, portfolio tracking, API access, bulk lookups) behind a low-cost premium tier

gaps.gap: No integrated fraud detection alongside rarity scores to reduce user risk of buying fake/manipulated NFTs
gaps.implementation: Add real-time fraud checks embedded with rarity results: flag verified vs scam collections, detect post-mint trait manipulation, and flag wash-traded NFTs with inflated floor prices, with clear warnings shown to users before they click through to marketplaces

recommended_positioning: The ad-free, multi-chain NFT rarity checker for both casual collectors and independent creators, with built-in fraud protection and 100% free custom collection rarity calculation.
